tasks.title: Create Add Expense Modal
tasks.description: A modal form to add new expenses with fields for Title, Amount, Category (Food, Transport, Data, Rent, etc.), and Date. Include a save button.

tasks.title: Create History Tab Screen
tasks.description: A screen displaying a full list of past transactions with filtering by category and date range.

tasks.title: Create Profile Tab Screen
tasks.description: User profile screen showing user info, budget settings (edit monthly limit), theme toggle, and logout button.

tasks.title: Create Authentication Screens
tasks.description: Login and Signup screens with email/password fields, validation, and navigation to onboarding.

tasks.title: Create Onboarding Screen
tasks.description: A welcome screen explaining the app's value proposition and a step to set the initial monthly budget.
